info.title: Afosto API
info.description: Afosto commerce platform API providing IAM (OAuth), instant search, and QuicQ CDN proxy management. Includes endpoints for authentication, search indexes, document management, and CDN proxy configuration.

get.description: Returns a new authorization response for the session.

401.description: Unauthorized: invalid or expired authorization header

post.description: Returns a new access token using client credentials or refresh token.

400.description: Bad request: invalid filter, pagination or request body

401.description: Unauthorized: invalid or expired authorization header

get.description: List all search indexes for the authenticated user.

get.description: Show a single index for the tenant.

put.description: Update or insert a list of documents in the specified index. Enter any additional information in the metadata. Data in the metadata key is not searchable, only retrievable.

400.description: Bad request: invalid filter, pagination or request body

401.description: Unauthorized: invalid or expired authorization header

404.description: Not found: could not find requested entity

delete.description: Delete all documents from the specified index.

401.description: Unauthorized: invalid or expired authorization header

404.description: Not found: could not find requested entity

post.description: Search documents using a proxy key for a tenant. The count is the combined count of the results in all selected indices.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The proxy key for a tenant
